SEARCH
Package com.distributed2pc.participant.config

Class ParticipantConfig

java.lang.Object
com.distributed2pc.participant.config.ParticipantConfig
@Configuration public class ParticipantConfig extends Object
Spring configuration for the participant service.

Registers the fault strategy map used by FaultInjectionService. Adding a new fault type requires only a new ParticipantFaultStrategy implementation and a single entry in this map — no other class changes.

    • ParticipantConfig

      public ParticipantConfig()

  • Method Details

    • faultStrategies

      @Bean public Map<FaultType,ParticipantFaultStrategy> faultStrategies(CrashFaultStrategy crash, NetworkDelayFaultStrategy networkDelay, ForceAbortVoteFaultStrategy forceAbortVote, TransientFaultStrategy transientFault, IntermittentFaultStrategy intermittent)
      Builds the fault strategy map keyed by FaultType.
      Parameters:
      crash - strategy for the CRASH fault.
      networkDelay - strategy for the NETWORK_DELAY fault.
      forceAbortVote - strategy for the FORCE_ABORT_VOTE fault.
      intermittent - strategy for the INTERMITTENT (probabilistic) fault.
      transient_ - strategy for the TRANSIENT (auto-recovering) fault.
      Returns:
      immutable map of fault type to strategy.

    • webClientBuilder

      @Bean public org.springframework.web.reactive.function.client.WebClient.Builder webClientBuilder()
      Shared WebClient builder configured with the shared trust store so that peer-to-peer and coordinator HTTPS calls succeed inside Docker. Hostname verification is disabled to allow intra-container routing by service name rather than by certificate CN/SAN.
      Returns:
      a pre-configured builder instance.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the SSL context cannot be initialised.

    • objectMapper

      @Bean public com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper objectMapper()
      Jackson ObjectMapper with Java 8 date/time support.
      Returns:
      configured mapper instance.
